questions: What is the patient's systolic blood pressure (mmHg)?
What is the patient's diastolic blood pressure (mmHg)?
Does the patient have a fever? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's blood glucose level (mg/dL)?
Does the patient have signs of cerebral edema causing herniation? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a platelet count < 50,000/µl? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a cerebellar hemorrhage OR depressed mental status with hydrocephalus? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have chronic nonvalvular AF or untreated rheumatic heart disease with AF? (Yes/No)
Does the patient meet indications for thrombolysis (rtPA)? (Yes/No)
Has the patient used heparin within 48 hours AND is PTT prolonged OR INR elevated? (Yes/No)
Are the patient's symptoms rapidly improving? (Yes/No)
Has the patient had a prior stroke or head injury within 3 months OR prior intracranial hemorrhage? (Yes/No)
Has the patient had major surgery within 14 days? (Yes/No)
Has the patient had GI bleeding within 21 days? (Yes/No)
Has the patient had a recent myocardial infarction? (Yes/No)
Is the patient in a coma or stupor? (Yes/No)
